purpose: Define the exact complete certified real-path manifest required before the executed multiprobe profiled likelihood run can be promoted from input-gated target to executable evidence run.

planck_2018_likelihood.certification_required: file-level Planck 2018 likelihood path with provenance, checksum, and backend compatibility

planck_2018_lensing.certification_required: file-level Planck lensing likelihood or chain path with provenance and checksum

act_dr6_likelihood_or_chains.certification_required: ACT DR6 likelihood/chains with provenance, checksum, and expected schema

desi_dr2_bao_likelihood_or_covariance.certification_required: DESI DR2 BAO covariance or likelihood file with provenance and checksum

desi_dr2_bao_bestfit_or_chain.certification_required: DESI DR2 bestfit table or posterior chain with provenance and checksum

pantheon_plus_data.certification_required: Pantheon+ data file with provenance, checksum, and schema

pantheon_plus_covariance.certification_required: Pantheon+ covariance file with provenance, checksum, and schema

sh0es_calibrator_data.certification_required: SH0ES calibrator file with provenance, checksum, and schema

union3_or_des_sn_crosscheck.certification_required: Union3 or DES-SN crosscheck data/likelihood with provenance and checksum

des_y6_3x2pt_likelihood_or_chain.certification_required: DES Y6 3x2pt likelihood or chain file with provenance and checksum

kids_legacy_likelihood_or_chain.certification_required: KiDS-Legacy likelihood or chain with provenance and checksum

hsc_y3_likelihood_or_chain.certification_required: HSC-Y3 likelihood or chain with provenance and checksum

cmb_lensing_likelihood_or_chain.certification_required: CMB lensing likelihood or chain with provenance and checksum

nuisance_prior_table.certification_required: nuisance prior table covering CMB, BAO, SN/H0, growth, lensing, baryonic feedback, intrinsic alignment, photo-z, and calibration nuisances

systematics_profile_config.certification_required: full systematics profiling config with nuisance priors and marginalization/profile rules

holdout_split_manifest.certification_required: final blind/holdout split manifest with frozen split hash

certification_rules: every required input must have a non-null local path
every file or directory must have a checksum or digest manifest
every source must be classified as likelihood, chain, covariance, data table, prior table, config, or holdout manifest
candidate directories alone are insufficient unless they include a certified file-level digest manifest
no source-map paper or critique can substitute for likelihood input data
blocking_reason: The repository currently has partial candidate paths but not a complete certified file-level manifest with all required likelihood, covariance, chain, nuisance, systematics, and holdout inputs.
boundary: Certification target only. This does not certify complete likelihood inputs, execute a likelihood, reject Lambda-CDM, validate DFM-MKC, promote an alternative model, or resolve any Clay problem.
